title: ANC - ANC and Transparency are Off, make a call, ANC is off but active and Transparency is disabled
scenario: ANC becomes active during a call when both ANC and Transparency are set to OFF, while Transparency is disabled/greyed out
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on ANC (Active Noise Cancellation) and set it to OFF (no selected value)
Tap on Transparency Mode and set it to OFF (no selected value)
Verify both ANC and Transparency show no selected values and are in OFF state
Make a phone call using the connected Poly Bluetooth device (e.g., press Call button or initiate call from phone dialer)
During the active call, return to Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings
Observe the state of ANC and Transparency toggles
expected: ANC should remain OFF and be disabled/greyed out (not changeable by the user) during an active call. Transparency should also be disabled/greyed out (not changeable by the user) with no selected values.
